<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\ControlStructures; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BooleanNot; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\Ternary; class TernaryNegated extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'ControlStructures'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Negates the condition in a ternary statement.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = $b ? 1 : 2; // [tl! remove] $a = !$b ? 1 : 2; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [Ternary::class]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var Ternary $node */ if (! $node->if instanceof Expr) { $node->if = $node->cond; } $node->cond = new BooleanNot($node->cond); return $node; } }
